name: zero_len_subregion_matches_full
code:
proof fn phi_1_zero_len_subregion_matches_full(
    pm_view: PersistentMemoryRegionView,
    start: nat,
)
    requires
        pm_view.len() > 0,
        start + 0 <= pm_view.len(),
        pm_view.len() <= u64::MAX,
    ensures
        get_subregion_view(pm_view, start, 0nat).state =~= pm_view.state,
{
}
reason: A zero-length subregion should have empty state, not the full region's state

name: offset_subregion_equals_full_region
code:
proof fn phi_2_offset_subregion_equals_full_region(
    pm_view: PersistentMemoryRegionView,
    start: nat,
    len: nat,
)
    requires
        pm_view.len() > 1,
        start > 0,
        len > 0,
        start + len <= pm_view.len(),
        pm_view.len() <= u64::MAX,
    ensures
        get_subregion_view(pm_view, start, len).state =~= pm_view.state,
{
}
reason: A subregion starting at a non-zero offset should never equal the full region's state

name: different_starts_same_view
code:
proof fn phi_3_different_starts_same_view(
    pm_view: PersistentMemoryRegionView,
    s1: nat,
    s2: nat,
    len: nat,
)
    requires
        s1 != s2,
        len > 0,
        s1 + len <= pm_view.len(),
        s2 + len <= pm_view.len(),
        pm_view.len() <= u64::MAX,
    ensures
        get_subregion_view(pm_view, s1, len).state =~= get_subregion_view(pm_view, s2, len).state,
{
}
reason: Subregions at distinct offsets should not be universally extensionally equal

name: identical_views_reported_differing
code:
proof fn phi_4_identical_views_reported_differing(
    pm_view: PersistentMemoryRegionView,
    start: nat,
    len: nat,
    is_writable: spec_fn(int) -> bool,
)
    requires
        start + len <= pm_view.len(),
        pm_view.len() <= u64::MAX,
        len > 0,
    ensures
        !views_differ_only_where_subregion_allows(pm_view, pm_view, start, len, is_writable),
{
}
reason: Comparing a region view with itself must always satisfy the differ-only-where-allowed predicate

name: boundary_subregion_has_zero_len
code:
proof fn phi_5_boundary_subregion_has_zero_len(
    pm_view: PersistentMemoryRegionView,
    start: nat,
    len: nat,
)
    requires
        pm_view.len() > 0,
        len > 0,
        start + len == pm_view.len(),
        pm_view.len() <= u64::MAX,
    ensures
        get_subregion_view(pm_view, start, len).state.len() == 0,
{
}
reason: A subregion with positive length at the region boundary must not report zero-length state
